workout.finisher: Incline walk · 10 min · 3.3–3.5 mph · 6–8% incline. Skip if session hits 65 min.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.note: June 5: hit 380 × 10 × 3 clean. Adding 10 lb. Controlled tempo, don't lock out at top.

exercises.name: Hip Thrust Machine
exercises.note: June 5: hit 190 × 12 × 3 clean. Plate-loaded — 10 lb increments only. Full hip extension, squeeze at top, no hyperextension.

exercises.name: DB Romanian Deadlift
exercises.note: June 5: hit 60 × 12 × 3 but forearms gassed. Use the gym straps today — your legs have more in them than your grip does. Hinge from hips, soft knee, stretch at the bottom.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.note: June 5: 10/10/9 — slight improvement. Holding at 77 lb. Hamstrings are the weak link — don't chase weight here.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat (KB)
exercises.note: Swapping lunges out — two sessions in a row. Feet shoulder-width, toes slightly out. Sit into it, chest tall, drive through heels.

exercises.name: Core Circuit A
exercises.detail: Dead Bugs × 8/side + Side Plank 30s/side + Hollow Body Hold 25s · 2 rounds
exercises.rest: Minimal rest between movements, 60s between rounds
exercises.note: Dead bugs: lower back flat the whole time. Side plank: hips stacked. Hollow body: arms overhead, lower back flat — reset if hips pop up.
